title: White chocolate decadence – believe me, it's tastier than tasty

seo.title: White chocolate decadence - believe me, it's tastier than tasty - Marinda Kook

html:
Sometimes I feel like experimenting – and then it flops. BUT sometimes it works so well that you can't believe you made it yourself.. These chocolate balls take you beyond all bounds of deliciousness with so few ingredients.

 

YOU'LL NEED:

  • 1 tin condensed milk
  • 6 x 80g white chocolate slabs
  • 8 ml vanilla extract
  • 100 ml lemon juice
  • coconut to roll in

NOW:

  1. cook the condensed milk in the microwave for 3 min – stir after every minute
  2. stir in the chocolate
  3. stir in the lemon juice and vanilla extract
  4. pour into a bowl sprayed with Spray and Cook
  5. place in the fridge until cooled – about 2 hours
  6. use a teaspoon and your hand to roll balls
  7. roll in coconut
  8. place back in the fridge

Eat it as a dessert with a strong coffee, eat it as a treat, eat it just because it's so unbelievably delicious.

 

You're not going to be able to stop eating them…………..
